title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE, TO BE KNOWN AS LANAO   DEL  NORTE   PROVINCIAL  HOSPITAL,  AND  AUTHORIZING  THE  APPROPRIATION  OF FUNDS  THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 420 / 60 OG No. 39, 6190 (September 28, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3879, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE, TO BE KNOWN AS LANAO DEL NORTE PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established, under the direct supervision of the Director of Medical Services, a provincial hospital in the Province of Lanao del Norte, to be known as Lanao del Norte Provincial Hospital.

SEC. 2. The sum of two hundred fifty thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the establishment, operation and maintenance of said hosÂpital during the fiscal year nineteen hundred sixty five. Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for its operaÂtion and maintenance shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
